assignments.description: Sets ParticipantId as the account recordId.
assignments.name: SetAccountAsParticipantID
assignments.label: Set Account as Participant ID

assignments.description: Sets the isNotPersonAccount variable to true.
assignments.name: SetNotPersonAccount
assignments.label: Set Not Person Account

decisions.description: Determines whether the CreateParticipantBenefits flow ran and created records by checking if the CreateParticipantBenefits flow didn’t return a fault message and if the benefitDisbursementId contains a value.
decisions.name: HaveParticipantBenefits
decisions.label: Have Participant Benefits?

decisions.description: Determines whether the account record is a person account by checking if the IsPersonAccount field is true.
decisions.name: HavePersonAccount
decisions.label: Have Person Account?

decisions.description: Determines whether the contact was selected from SelectParticipantsDataTable.
decisions.name: HaveSelectedParticipant
decisions.label: Have Selected Participant?

decisions.description: Determines whether the isPersonAccountSelected is set to true.
decisions.name: HaveSelectedPersonAccount
decisions.label: Have Selected Person Account?

decisions.description: Determines whether the CreateAnotherBenefitDisbursementCheckbox on the ScreenDisplayConfirmationBenefitDisbursement screen is set to true.
decisions.name: IsCreateAnotherBenefitDisbursementSelected
decisions.label: Is Create Another Benefit Disbursement Selected?

decisions.description: Determines whether the record ID corresponds to an account, contact or case by checking if the recordId starts with '001' (account) or '003' (contact) or '500' (case). Updates the participantId variable to the associated account ID if it's an account, contact or case.
decisions.name: SetParticipantId
decisions.label: Set Participant ID

dynamicChoiceSets.description: Stores the collection choice set used in the BenefitAssignmentLookup screen component on the ScreenCollectBenefitDisbursementDetails screen. The benefits shown in the component are active and sorted descending by StartDateTime. The choice label is set to Name and the choice value is set to ID.
dynamicChoiceSets.name: ChoiceActiveBenefits

formulas.description: Calculates whether the search term value is at least two characters long. The formula returns True if the searchTerm value is at least two characters long. Otherwise, the formula returns False. This formula is used as a condition to run the Find Contacts From Search action when the searchTerm value changes.
formulas.name: SearchTermLengthFormula

recordLookups.description: Gets the Account record associated with the selected contact from SelectParticipantsDataTable.
recordLookups.name: GetAccount
recordLookups.label: Get Account

recordLookups.description: Gets the case record that matches the value of the recordId. The account ID on the case record is stored in the ParticipantId variable.
recordLookups.name: GetAccountFromCase
recordLookups.label: Get Account from Case

recordLookups.description: Gets the contact record that matches the value of the recordId. The account ID on the contact record is stored in the ParticipantId variable.
recordLookups.name: GetAccountFromContact
recordLookups.label: Get Account from Contact

recordLookups.description: Gets the account record with an ID that matches the ParticipantId. Stores the isPersonAccount of the account record in the isPersonAccountSelected variable.
recordLookups.name: GetAccountRecord
recordLookups.label: Get Account Record

recordLookups.description: Gets the benefits records that are marked as active. Stores these records in the Benefits from Get Active Benefits.
recordLookups.name: GetActiveBenefits
recordLookups.label: Get Active Benefits

screens.description: Allows the flow user to specify a participant, benefit, disbursement date, and disbursement quantity for the benefit to be disbursed. Clicking Save launches a flow to create a benefit disbursement record with the specified values along with any missing program enrollments and benefits.
screens.name: ScreenCollectBenefitDisbursementDetails
screens.label: Collect Benefit Disbursement Details

fields.name: NotPersonAccountDisplayText
fields.fieldText: The selected participant isn't related to a person account record. Select a different participant.

fields.name: SearchParticipantsDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Find by name the participant to receive the benefit disbursement.

screens.description: Displays a confirmation to the flow user that includes the benefit disbursement ID that was created and lets the flow user create another benefit disbursement without exiting the flow.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayConfirmationBenefitDisbursement
screens.label: Display Benefit Disbursement Confirmation

screens.description: Displays an error message to the flow user when there's an error running the CreateParticipantBenefits flow.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayErrorCreateParticipantBenefit
screens.label: Display Error

fields.name: ErrorCreateParticipantBenefitsDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
Something went wrong and we couldn't create a benefit disbursement record.


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

screens.description: Displays an error message to the flow user when there’s an error getting the account ID from the case record.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayErrorGetAccountFromCase
screens.label: Display Error

fields.name: ErrorGetAccountFromCaseDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
Something went wrong and we couldn't get the account ID from the case record.


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

screens.description: Displays an error message to the flow user when there’s an error getting the account ID from the contact record.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayErrorGetAccountFromContact
screens.label: Display Error

fields.name: ErrorGetAccountFromContactDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
Something went wrong and we couldn't get the account ID from the contact record.


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

screens.description: Displays an error to the flow user when there’s an error getting the active benefit records.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayErrorGetActiveBenefits
screens.label: Display Error

fields.name: ErrorGetActiveBenefitsDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
Something went wrong and we couldn't get the active benefit records. 


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

screens.description: Displays an error to the flow user when a Get Records element returns an error.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayGetRecordsError
screens.label: Display Error

fields.name: FaultMessageDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
Something went wrong and we couldn't retrieve the record. {!$Flow.FaultMessage}

﻿{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

screens.description: Displays an error to the flow user when the current record isn't a person account.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayInvalidAccountError
screens.label: Display Error

fields.name: InvalidAccountErrorDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
Something went wrong because the current record isn't a person account. {!$Flow.FaultMessage}﻿


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

subflows.description: Calls a flow that generates a benefit disbursement record and creates any missing related records required for program enrollment and benefit assignment. Sets the benefit, disbursement quantity, and participant to the values selected in the ScreenCollectBenefitDisbursementDetails screen. Stores the resulting collection in the Outputs from CreateParticipantBenefits record collection.
subflows.name: CreateParticipantBenefits
subflows.label: Create Participant Benefits

variables.description: Stores a boolean value that indicates whether the contact that was selected in SelectParticipantsDataTble is related to a person account. The default value is false.
variables.name: isNotPersonAccount

variables.description: Stores a boolean variable that indicates whether the account that's related with the originating record is a person account record. The default value is false.
variables.name: isPersonAccountSelected

variables.description: Stores the account ID for the participant of a benefit disbursement.
variables.name: ParticipantId

variables.description: Stores the ID for the account passed into the flow.
variables.name: recordId
